{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321141108F1284B20FF565FC0FAD1\"}"},"total":244},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6902228733705437184","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢看此类侦探推理破案小说，就目前看到的章节，作者思路清晰，没有故意刻意营造惊恐，案件情节循序渐进，有待看到最终。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1607050366,"group_id":"6631528766201924622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8IueZjLbNqMWYOExJ52ciUlkY8ngk2uhPCtS17N5AqO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4050226716877220","user_name":"蒲城的篠冢弥生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4050226716877220","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1747130797,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6631528766201924622","book_info":{"abstract":"重案组，是死亡的见证者，还是人性的救赎者。将罪犯绳之以法，是他们唯一的使命，妖魔鬼怪不及人心恐怖。悬案屡现偏遇多重阻碍，疑难杂案层出不穷。重案组又应如何化解，他们所给你呈现的，是你所不知道的暗黑世界，还有你不敢直面的扭曲内心。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/ef9fb751847d943277c45d5bf58f3646","author":"暮雨年华","author_id":"","book_id":"6631528766201924622","book_name":"刑案","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read
